title: Getting Into a Routine
sentences: Although I am not a morning person, I try to wake up early.
I get up early because I want time for a proper breakfast.
After I get dressed, I check my messages on my phone.
I usually skip breakfast if I wake up late.
On my way to work, I often stop by a small cafe.
My job keeps me busy, so I rarely take a long lunch.
In the evening, I try to wind down before bed.
Sometimes I go for a run to clear my head.
I have started cooking dinner instead of buying takeaway food.
Although my routine is simple, it helps me feel organised.
I usually turn off my phone before I fall asleep.
